About
Talk to an engineer

Platform

Managed condition monitoring. Not another dashboard.

SAM4 monitors your motor fleet from the motor control cabinet — without sensors on the asset. AI models detect faults and energy waste. Every alert is validated by a Samotics diagnostics engineer before it reaches your team.

Trusted to monitor 10,000+ industrial assets across utilities, metals, and heavy industry.

See what SAM4 monitors Estimate your fleet coverage

Three capabilities powering SAM4

SAM4 combines sensorless fault detection, energy analysis, and edge infrastructure in one platform.

Fault detection

SAM4 Health

Detect developing faults weeks to months before failure using electrical signature analysis. Every finding validated by a diagnostics engineer.

Explore diagnostics →

Energy performance

SAM4 Energy

Identify energy waste per asset and benchmark against optimal efficiency points. Quantify savings in kWh and cost.

Explore energy insights →

Edge infrastructure

SAM4 Edge

Capture electrical signatures at the MCC and transmit securely via cellular. No corporate network required.

Explore architecture →

How It Works

From sensor installation to a validated maintenance recommendation in five steps.

1

Install at MCC

CTs and VTs installed in under 30 minutes. No production shutdown.

2

Capture signatures

Continuous electrical signature collection via cellular uplink.

3

AI detection

Machine learning models detect mechanical, electrical, and process faults.

4

Engineer validation

Every finding reviewed by a Samotics diagnostics engineer. No false-positive noise.

5

Actionable alert

Your team receives a diagnosis with severity, root cause, and recommended action.

What Makes SAM4 Different

Not another condition monitoring platform. SAM4 was built to solve the problems others leave behind.

No sensors on the asset

Installed at the MCC — not on the machine. Monitor assets in hazardous, submerged, or inaccessible locations.

Engineer-validated alerts

Every alert reviewed by a diagnostics engineer before delivery. Less than 1% false positive rate.

Managed service, not software

You get a diagnostics team, a customer success manager, and quarterly business reviews — not a login.

Health + energy in one system

Condition monitoring and energy efficiency from the same electrical signature. No extra hardware.

No IT integration required

Cellular connectivity with complete OT network isolation. No inbound connections to plant systems.

Scales to full fleet

From 10 assets to 10,000. Multi-site rollout in weeks with no production downtime.

Explore the Platform

Everything you need to evaluate, deploy, and scale SAM4.
